markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content feedback and refine the article creation workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Front-load the workflow:** Move post-generation edits (tone, CTAs) into the assignment brief to reduce editing time from 2+ hours to the 45–60 minute target.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [**Balance human & algorithm:** Structure articles to satisfy both the ICP (deep insights) and search engines (foundational SEO sections) for optimal performance.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - **Fix the agentic pipeline:** Report the recurring "unexpected error" in the `#internal-datagrid` Slack channel to escalate the fix and enable the scalable workflow.
  - [**Standardize tables:** Use a shared HTML template and Claude to generate consistent, on-brand tables for Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=2485.0)

## Topics

### Content Feedback & Workflow Refinement

  - [**Problem:** Recent articles had issues like long sentences and a "software manual" tone.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Insufficiently detailed assignment briefs.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [**Solution:** Front-load the workflow by moving post-generation edits into the brief.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This improves the initial draft quality, reducing editing time to the 45–60 minute target.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
      - [**Method:** Use specific negative prompts (e.g., "avoid a software manual tone") and pre-define CTAs in the brief.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Article Strategy: Balancing Human & Algorithm

  - [**Problem:** The "AI Product Manager" article was too narrow, focusing only on agent deployment instead of the role's broader scope.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [**Cause:** A conflict between the Airtable brief (which implied a deep dive) and the AI agent persona (which assumes foundational knowledge).](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
  - [**Solution:** Balance content for both audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
      - [**Algorithm:** Include foundational SEO sections (e.g., "What is an AI Product Manager?") to meet search engine expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
      - [**Human:** Condense these sections into a single H2 and dedicate the rest of the article to deep, persona-relevant insights.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [**Action:** Revise the "AI Product Manager" article to broaden its scope.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)

### Technical & Process Improvements

  - [**Agentic Pipeline:** The tool remains broken with an "unexpected error."](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - **Action:** Report the issue in the `#internal-datagrid` Slack channel to ensure visibility for engineering, Mara, and Andy.
  - [**Webflow Tables:** Tables appear unstyled due to missing CSS.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=2435.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use a shared HTML template and Claude to generate consistent, on-brand tables for Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=2485.0)
  - [**LLM Metrics Article:** The article lists metric *categories* (e.g., "Accuracy Metrics"), not the specific metrics themselves.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=3365.0)
      - [**Action:** Revise the article to list and briefly describe actual metrics (e.g., BLEU, ROUGE, Precision, Recall) to improve SEO and user value.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=3403.0)

### Admin: Content Pillars & Out-of-Office

  - [**Pillar Merging:** The goal is to simplify content categories for an upcoming DataGrid website redesign.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To avoid a messy backend and prepare for a cleaner navigation structure.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=2306.0)
      - [**Status:** Not a performance concern; keyword cannibalization is not a current issue.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=2213.0)
  - [**Out-of-Office:** Nathan is eligible for the "quiet week."](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=3685.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nathan:**](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
      - Report the agentic pipeline error in the `#internal-datagrid` Slack channel.
      - [Revise the "AI Product Manager" article to balance human and algorithm needs.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
      - [Ask Nika to revise the LLM metrics article with specific metrics and descriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=3365.0)
      - [Use the shared HTML template and Claude to generate future Webflow tables.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=2485.0)
  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=3243.0)
      - [Send Nathan the shared HTML table template.](https://fathom.video/share/YtBRaJtGHyNSZyRxz9zx-p4ZDY_viMD9?tab=summary&timestamp=3243.0)
